title: The Pride and Prejudice
author: Jane Austen
description: A classic romance exploring manners, upbringing, and love.
quote: You must allow me to tell you how ardently I admire and love you.

title: Book Lovers
author: Emily Henry
description: Two bookish rivals find themselves in the same small town.
quote: In books, I found the friends I couldn't find in the world.

title: The Fault in Our Stars
author: John Green
description: Two teenage cancer patients fall deeply in love.
quote: Some infinites are bigger than other infinites.

title: The Song of Achilles
author: Madeline Miller
description: A tragic, beautiful retelling of Achilles and Patroclus.
quote: He is half of my soul, as the poets say.

title: A Little Life
author: Hanya Yanagihara
description: A deeply emotional story of friendship, trauma, and endurance.
quote: Things don't get fixed. But they get put in perspective.

title: Me Before You
author: Jojo Moyes
description: A heartbreaking love story between a caregiver and a paralyzed man.
quote: You are pretty much the only thing that makes me want to get up in the morning.

title: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: Bilbo Baggins journeys to reclaim a stolen treasure from a dragon.
quote: In a hole in the ground there lived a hobbit.

title: The Way of Kings
author: Brandon Sanderson
description: An epic fantasy world where storm-driven lands shape empires.
quote: Life before death. Strength before weakness. Journey before destination.

title: The Chronicles of Narnia
author: C.S. Lewis
description: Four siblings discover a wardrobe that leads to a magical land.
quote: Wrong will be right, when Aslan comes in sight.

title: The Secret History
author: Donna Tartt
description: A group of eccentric misfits discover a completely new way of thinking.
quote: Beauty is terror. Whatever we call beautiful, we quiver before it.

title: If We Were Villains
author: M.L. Rio
description: Seven young Shakespearean actors face a real-life tragedy.
quote: But that is the thing about tragedy; we are drawn to it.

title: The Picture of Dorian Gray
author: Oscar Wilde
description: A man sells his soul for eternal youth and beauty.
quote: The only way to get rid of a temptation is to yield to it.

title: The House in the Cerulean Sea
author: TJ Klune
description: A cozy, uplifting story about a lovely found family.
quote: You are a wonderful thing, Mr. Baker. And the world is better with you in it.

title: Legends & Lattes
author: Travis Baldree
description: An orc gives up her sword to open the first-ever coffee shop.
quote: Things don't have to be perfect to be good.

title: The Secret Garden
author: Frances Hodgson Burnett
description: An orphaned girl discovers a hidden, magical garden.
quote: If you look the right way, you can see that the whole world is a garden.

title: And Then There Were None
author: Agatha Christie
description: Ten strangers are lured to an isolated island, and one by one they die.
quote: Ten little Indian boys went out to dine; One choked his little self and then there were nine.

title: Gone Girl
author: Gillian Flynn
description: A toxic marriage ends in a mysterious disappearance on an anniversary.
quote: There's a difference between really loving someone and loving the idea of her.

title: The Silent Patient
author: Alex Michaelides
description: A woman shoots her husband and never speaks another word.
quote: The only person who can heal us is ourselves.
